name: Caught Red-Handed - Lanolin/Gadget (Sonic Forces/IGW Comics)
description:
[Diamond Cutter member POV]

At the end of your shift at your part-time job, you're set to make a delivery at Gadget's apartment, taking the last order as an excuse to met up with your friend...

What you didn't expect was to find Lanolin there, too. Not only that, but seeing your usually serious and responsible leader just standing at the door, wearing one of Gadget's "GAMER" shirts, with bite marks all over, and with... Something dripping down her thighs...

=====X=====
